title: microlonchus reboudii
intro: Microlonchus reboudii, also known as "Ruscus aculeatus," is a type of flowering plant in the Asparagaceae family, native to Europe and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Microlonchus reboudii include reducing swelling, relieving urinary issues, and supporting kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often harvested and used in infusions, tinctures, or ointments to leverage its medicinal properties.
